arxiv_paper.title: Self-Referential K-SAT and the Finite Analogue of Gödel's Incompleteness Theorem

our_ammo.title: Structural Mathematics Completion: The N=2 Critical Point and the Hard Boundary of Formal System Self-Reference

arxiv_paper.title: The Chameleon's Limit: Investigating Persona Collapse and Homogenization in Large Language Models
arxiv_paper.affiliations: CMU, UChicago, MIT, UTokyo, RIKEN AIP, JHU
arxiv_paper.summary: Identifies 'Persona Collapse' — agents assigned distinct profiles converge into narrow behavioral modes. Measures Coverage/Uniformity/Complexity across 10 LLMs. Counter-intuitive finding: models with highest per-persona fidelity produce most stereotyped populations. Behavioral variation tracks coarse demographic stereotypes not fine-grained individual differences.

our_ammo.title: Judgment Dilution in AI Personality: The Hidden Cost of Fragmented Task Wake-Ups
our_ammo.angle: Fragmenting AI tasks degrades judgment — a structural pattern invisible to benchmark-driven evaluation. Persona collapse is the behavioral signature of structural judgment dilution.

arxiv_paper.title: From AGI to ASI
arxiv_paper.summary: Four pathways from AGI to ASI: scaling AGI, AI paradigm shifts, recursive improvement, and ASI emerging from large-scale multi-agent collectives. Discusses frictions/bottlenecks. Suggests ASI transition may be a series of transformative changes, not a single step change.

our_ammo.title: Hyper-AI: A Structural Framework for Human-AI Coupling Beyond General Intelligence
our_ammo.angle: AGI is the wrong target. Hyper-AI = human-AI structural coupling, not machine surpassing human. All four DeepMind pathways miss the coupling dimension entirely.

arxiv_paper.title: Learning the Mechanism of Catastrophic Forgetting: A Perspective from Gradient Similarity
arxiv_paper.affiliations: Tsinghua University + Peking University + Northeastern University
arxiv_paper.summary: Theoretically proves strongly negative gradient similarity is the fundamental cause of catastrophic forgetting. Identifies conflicting neurons (50-75%) vs collaborative neurons (25-50%). Proposes CNL method achieving zero forgetting under theoretical conditions, 59-82% reduction out-of-set.

our_ammo.title: Mutual-Reference Closure Depth: The Structural Root Cause of Catastrophic Forgetting
our_ammo.angle: Forgetting is not gradient conflict — it's the breaking of mutual-reference closure depth. Gradient conflict is the symptom; structural closure breaking is the cause. Their 'conflicting neurons' are structural closure failure signatures.

arxiv_paper.title: Agent Drift: Quantifying Behavioral Degradation in Multi-Agent LLM Systems Over Extended Interactions
arxiv_paper.summary: Introduces 'agent drift' — progressive degradation of behavior, decision quality, inter-agent coherence. Three manifestations: semantic drift, coordination drift, behavioral drift. Novel Agent Stability Index (ASI) across 12 dimensions. Proposes episodic memory consolidation, drift-aware routing, adaptive behavioral anchoring.

our_ammo.title: Judgment Dilution in AI Personality: The Hidden Cost of Fragmented Task Wake-Ups
our_ammo.angle: Their 'agent drift' taxonomy (semantic/coordination/behavioral) maps directly to our judgment dilution framework. Their drift is our dilution — independently discovered structural degradation pattern.

arxiv_paper.title: Machine Spirits: Speculation and Adaptation of LLM Agents in Asset Markets
arxiv_paper.summary: 15 LLMs tested in simulated financial markets. LLMs exhibit spectrum from stable fundamental-value coordination to human-like speculative bubbles. Heterogeneous populations generate endogenous instability. Advanced models adapt strategies to exploit less sophisticated agents, amplifying volatility.

our_ammo.title: Structural Market Theory: The Self-Referential Collapse Model of Bubbles
our_ammo.angle: Bubbles are not irrational exuberance — they're self-referential constraint solving collapse. Their 'machine spirits' producing endogenous instability = structural coupling feedback in market systems.

arxiv_paper.title: Capability Thresholds and Manufacturing Topology: How Embodied Intelligence Triggers Phase Transitions in Economic Geography
arxiv_paper.summary: Formalizes Capability Space C=(d,g,r,t). When embodied AI crosses critical thresholds, manufacturing geography undergoes topological reorganization: weight inversion, batch collapse, human-infrastructure decoupling. Introduces 'Machine Climate Advantage' — factory siting determined by machine-optimal conditions, not human labor pools.

our_ammo.title: After Production Goes to AI: Societal Structural Phase Transition from Sustained Coupling to Oscillatory Coupling
our_ammo.angle: Their 'capability thresholds triggering topological reorganization' mirrors our phase transition framework. Their decoupling pathways (weight inversion, batch collapse, human-infrastructure decoupling) = instances of our sustained→oscillatory coupling shift.

arxiv_paper.title: Redefining Superalignment: From Weak-to-Strong Alignment to Human-AI Co-Alignment for Sustainable Symbiotic Society
arxiv_paper.affiliations: Chinese Academy of Sciences (Brain-inspired Cognitive AI Lab) + Peking University
arxiv_paper.summary: Redefines superalignment as human-AI co-alignment toward sustainable symbiotic society. Two-layer framework: external oversight (human-centered ultimate decision) + intrinsic proactive alignment (self-awareness, self-reflection, empathy). Integrates external oversight with intrinsic alignment.

our_ammo.title: Hyper-AI: A Structural Framework for Human-AI Coupling Beyond General Intelligence
our_ammo.angle: Their 'human-AI co-alignment' is conceptually close to our 'human-AI structural coupling.' Their intrinsic alignment (self-awareness, empathy) maps to our coupling closure. Chinese Academy of Sciences — strategic domestic coupling target.

arxiv_paper.title: Dissecting AI Trading: Behavioral Finance and Market Bubbles
arxiv_paper.summary: AI agents exhibit classic behavioral patterns (disposition effect, extrapolative beliefs). Targeted prompt interventions causally amplify or suppress specific behavioral mechanisms, altering bubble magnitude. Twenty-mechanism scoring framework for agent reasoning analysis.

our_ammo.title: Structural Market Theory: The Self-Referential Collapse Model of Bubbles
our_ammo.angle: Their finding that prompt interventions change bubble magnitude = mechanism-level evidence that bubbles are structurally manipulable, not purely stochastic.

arxiv_paper.title: PROClaim: Courtroom-Style Multi-Agent Debate with Progressive RAG and Role-Switching for Controversial Claim Verification
arxiv_paper.summary: Courtroom-style framework with Plaintiff/Defense/Judge roles + Progressive RAG. Achieves 81.7% accuracy on Check-COVID, outperforming standard multi-agent debate by +10pp. Structural deliberation and model heterogeneity mitigate systematic biases.

our_ammo.title: The Triadic Structure of the Courtroom — Why Prosecution, Defense, and Adjudication Are Structural Necessity
our_ammo.angle: Their finding that structural deliberation (Plaintiff+Defense+Judge) outperforms unstructured debate validates our triadic completeness proof. The third position (Judge) is structurally necessary for bias mitigation — exactly as our framework predicts.

arxiv_paper.title: Parliamentary Efficiency under Majority and Supermajority Rules: The Role of Independent Legislators
arxiv_paper.affiliations: Universidad de Concepción + Universidad del Desarrollo, Chile
arxiv_paper.summary: Agent-based model of parliamentary decision-making. Four critical thresholds partition parameter space into coalition regimes. Under simple majority: interior efficiency maximum at pivot-based coalition formation. Under strong supermajorities: minority veto or coordination breakdown.

our_ammo.title: The Triadic Completeness of Political Systems — Why Multi-Party Systems May Be Structurally Incomplete
our_ammo.angle: Their 'four critical thresholds' and 'structural fragmentation' language converges with our triadic completeness analysis. Their finding that simple majority has interior efficiency maximum at pivot — but supermajority causes breakdown — maps to our claim that binary systems are structurally incomplete.

arxiv_paper.title: Loosely-Structured Software: Engineering Context, Structure, and Evolution Entropy in Runtime-Rewired Multi-Agent Systems
arxiv_paper.summary: Introduces 'Loosely-Structured Software' (LSS) — engineering discipline for managing runtime entropy in LLM-based multi-agent systems. Three-layer framework: View/Context Engineering, Structure Engineering, Evolution Engineering. 'Evolution entropy' as core design metric.

our_ammo.title: Structural Computer Science: Nesting Rate Conduction Optimization in Software Architecture
our_ammo.angle: Their 'evolution entropy' and 'structural engineering' terminology independently converges with our nesting-rate-based software architecture framework. Their three-layer engineering maps to our structural coupling levels.

arxiv_paper.title: Phase Transitions in Sociotechnical Systems: From Post-Labor Economics to Homeostatic Civilization
arxiv_paper.summary: Unified mathematical framework for civilizational-scale transformations. Six formal models including cubic-ODE post-labor transition with bistability, algorithmic resource distribution, and homeostatic feedback governance. Civilizational cascade shown to be 'doubly conditional' — not inevitable.

our_ammo.title: After Production Goes to AI: Societal Structural Phase Transition from Sustained Coupling to Oscillatory Coupling
our_ammo.angle: Their 'post-labor economics with bistability' is the mathematical formalization of our sustained→oscillatory coupling transition. Their 'doubly conditional' cascade = our coupling-dependent phase transition.
